name: Murayama
description: Member of Kuoh Academy's Girls' Kendō Club, and are anime-exclusive characters. She and Katase are often subjected to Issei, Matsuda, and Motohama's lecherous peeping, in which they and the rest of the club retaliate by beating them with their shinai. They are also in the same class as the Perverted Trio.  (Source: Wikipedia)
